deny-git-external.description: Blocks git operations against an external repository path (git -C <path> ...). Requires bash-deny and jq on PATH; no-ops if either is missing.

deny-git-commit.description: Blocks local history commits (git commit). Requires bash-deny and jq on PATH; no-ops if either is missing.

deny-git-push.description: Blocks remote uploads (git push). Requires bash-deny and jq on PATH; no-ops if either is missing.

deny-git-history-rewrite.description: Blocks history-rewriting commands (git reset --hard, git rebase). Requires bash-deny and jq on PATH; no-ops if either is missing.
deny-git-history-rewrite.shell: CMD=$(printf '%s' "$PI_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); [ -z "$CMD" ] || bash-deny -r 'git reset --hard;git rebase' -i "$CMD" -q

deny-git-destructive.description: Blocks work-loss commands: git clean, git branch -D (force delete), git stash drop, git stash clear, git checkout -- (discard working tree). Requires bash-deny and jq on PATH; no-ops if either is missing.
deny-git-destructive.shell: CMD=$(printf '%s' "$PI_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); [ -z "$CMD" ] || bash-deny -r 'git clean;git branch -D;git stash drop;git stash clear;git checkout --' -i "$CMD" -q
